form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1609m. Last start won by 1.5 m as favourite (Fr5) at this track (1:54.20) beating Center Of It All in NW1500L4 on March 29 at $1.20. Recent form hard to fault and is again a strong contender.
